sources.citation: Auto-G16 R33 provisional P0 candidate inventory
sources.claim_ceiling: Inventory and observations only; no M1 acceptance, protocol, TS, or live authority.

sources.citation: MOBH35 R33 start, TS, and end coordinate blocks transcribed from ct1c01126_si_003.txt
sources.claim_ceiling: Ordered Cartesian coordinates and element inventory only; charge, multiplicity, roles, mode, and endpoint identities are absent from the coordinate text.

sources.citation: Semidalas and Martin, J. Chem. Theory Comput. 2022, 18, 883-898
sources.locator: Methods paragraphs beginning 'Where possible, conventional canonical CCSD(T)' and 'In order to get our bearings concerning static correlation diagnostics'
sources.claim_ceiling: The article reports that all investigated systems are closed-shell and that the lowest closed-shell singlet SCF solution was checked; it does not enumerate R33 alternative multiplicities or approve an Auto-G16 wavefunction policy.

sources.citation: Semidalas and Martin 2022 lawful Europe PMC supplementary bundle
sources.locator: Europe PMC supplementaryFiles response containing ct1c01126_si_001.pdf, ct1c01126_si_002.xlsx, and ct1c01126_si_003.txt
sources.claim_ceiling: Container provenance only; each scientific claim remains bound to its member hash and locator.

sources.locator: sheet Diagnostics Def2SV_P or Def2SVP rows 99-101 and formula cells O202:O204
sources.claim_ceiling: Reports CH11N2Pt(1+) and numerical diagnostics; it does not itself supply oxidation state, d count, multiplicity, or an acceptance threshold.

sources.citation: Iron and Janes MOBH35 ChemRxiv v2 author archive mobh35-tar.tgz
sources.locator: archive members r33+.xyz, ts33+.xyz, and p33+.xyz comments report CH11N2Pt+
sources.claim_ceiling: Strengthens +1 charge provenance and reported diagnostic context; multiplicity and scientific acceptance are absent.

sources.citation: Iron, Lo, Martin, and Keinan, JACS 2002 supporting dataset metadata
sources.locator: ACS Figshare API article 3642549, file 5731353, description and related-material fields
sources.claim_ceiling: Metadata reports TpPtMe(H)2 H/D scrambling, an eta2-CH-CH4 complex, and a separate N3 ammonia model; it does not identify the N2 R33 reduced coordinate state.

sources.locator: ACS Figshare file 5731353; size 46316; supplied MD5 9ec842c2537f2510f8a217dffff4e298
sources.claim_ceiling: File content was not obtained because the upstream WAF/S3 path did not yield the object; no content claim is accepted.

electron_accounting.review_notes: Charge +1 is directly source-reported for the exact R33 data object. No oxidation, ligand-charge, d-count, total-electron, or parity value is copied or derived.
blockers: Formal Pt oxidation state is not source-reported for the exact N2 R33 object.
Ligand identities and charge conventions are not source-reported for the exact N2 R33 object.
d-electron count, total electron count, and electron parity remain null rather than being inferred from elements or charge.

source_reported_multiplicity_candidates.basis: The 2022 primary article states that all investigated systems are closed-shell and that convergence to the lowest closed-shell singlet SCF solution was verified.

spin_surface.review_notes: Multiplicity 1 is recorded as a source-reported candidate, not inferred from electron parity and not automatically scientifically accepted.
blockers: No exact R33 source enumerates credible alternative multiplicities or their common energy reference.
Single-surface, spin-crossover, two-state-reactivity, and MECP relevance have no candidate-bound reviewer decision.

facts.source_observation: The primary article reports cross-program checks of the lowest closed-shell singlet SCF solution for the investigated set; this is not a candidate-bound Auto-G16 stability or wavefunction acceptance policy.

wavefunction.review_notes: Reported diagnostics and a lowest-solution check are preserved as observations only; SCF convergence is not electronic-state validation.
blockers: Restricted, unrestricted, restricted-open-shell, or broken-symmetry reference choice is not source-reported for the exact candidate.
SCF stability, S-squared, occupations, alternative solutions, and checkpoint reuse lack candidate-bound policies.
No reviewer has supplied system-specific multireference diagnostics or acceptance and escalation criteria.

facts.measurement_scope: Exhaustive Pt2-to-every-other-atom distances measured from the three source coordinate blocks; no cutoff, bond, coordination, hapticity, or ligand assignment is inferred.

coordination.review_notes: The contact table is a coordinate measurement table, not a coordination assignment. The N2 R33 object is not silently equated with the separately reported N3 ammonia model.
blockers: Coordination number and geometry have no exact candidate-bound source or reviewer assignment.
Ligand identity, stoichiometry, denticity, hapticity, and hemilability remain unassigned.
Substrate, counterion, ion-pair, solvent, additive, agostic, and secondary-sphere roles remain unassigned.
No reviewer-supplied coordination distance windows exist.

facts.source_reaction_context: The primary 2002 dataset metadata reports Pt methyl-hydride H/D scrambling through an eta2-CH-CH4 complex, but its separately named N3 ammonia model is not the N2 R33 coordinate object.
facts.required_future_mode_evidence: Exactly one raw imaginary frequency plus hash-bound displacement review against reviewer-supplied forming, breaking, or transferring coordinates and unintended coordination loss.

reaction_ts_path.review_notes: Source block labels and geometric changes do not establish a chemical elementary-step class, normal mode, IRC connectivity, or endpoint identity.
blockers: Exact reactant and product identities for the N2 R33 coordinate state are not source-located.
Chemical atom roles and forming, breaking, or transferring pairs are not reviewer accepted.
No candidate-bound raw imaginary frequency or displacement vector is available.
No bidirectional IRC with structurally identified endpoints is available, and transition-metal IRC remains unsupported.

facts.literature_context_only: The 2022 article reports def2-family coupled-cluster benchmark calculations, Stuttgart RECP use for second- and third-row transition metals, and lowest closed-shell singlet SCF checks. The 2002 dataset metadata reports mPW1k/LANL2DZ-family and SDD-family model calculations. Neither record is adopted as an Auto-G16 R33 protocol.

method_protocol.review_notes: Reported benchmark and model methods are evidence about their publications only; no method, basis, ECP, solvent, thermochemistry, or TS algorithm is selected.
blockers: Exact R33 optimization and frequency method provenance is not closed by the reviewed sources.
Per-element basis and ECP identity, ECP core size, and relativistic treatment are not approved.
Solvent, thermochemistry, temperature, standard state, and low-frequency treatment are not approved.
No three-tier protocol options artifact, protocol selection, or TS strategy selection exists.
